# Architecture Overview

System architecture for Bander: a self-hosted media library server.

## Technology Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Runtime | PHP 8.5+ with Swoole (async, process mode with HMR) |
| Framework | Symfony 8.0 |
| Database | PostgreSQL 18 with PGroonga full-text search |
| Cache | Redis (tag-aware cache, Messenger transport, SSE Pub/Sub) |
| ORM | Doctrine ORM with custom types |
| API Docs | Nelmio ApiDoc (OpenAPI) |
| Auth | League OAuth2 Server, WebAuthn, OTPHP (TOTP) |
| Frontend | React + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS v4 + TanStack Query |
| Desktop | Electron wrapper |
| Transcoding | FFmpeg via Swoole CPU process pool |

## Request Lifecycle

```
Client Request
  → Nginx (reverse proxy, TLS termination)
    → Swoole HTTP Server (worker process)
      → Symfony Kernel (booted once, reused per request)
        → Route matching → Controller (Interface layer)
          → Command dispatch (Messenger) or Port interface call
            → Handler / Infrastructure service
              → Domain model (business logic)
                → Repository → Doctrine → PostgreSQL
```

## Bounded Context Architecture

```
src/<Context>/
├── Domain/              # Business rules — no framework dependencies
│   ├── Model/           #   Aggregate roots (with State objects) and value objects
│   ├── Repository/      #   Repository interfaces (contracts)
│   ├── Event/           #   Domain events
│   ├── Service/         #   Domain services
│   └── ValueObject/     #   Value objects (when not in Model/)
├── Application/         # Use cases — thin orchestration layer
│   ├── Command/         #   CQRS command DTOs (final readonly)
│   ├── CommandHandler/  #   CQRS handlers (#[AsMessageHandler])
│   ├── Query/           #   CQRS query DTOs
│   ├── QueryHandler/    #   CQRS query handlers
│   ├── Port/            #   Port interfaces (canonical)
│   ├── DTO/             #   Data transfer objects
│   └── Service/         #   Application services
├── Infrastructure/      # Technical details — framework-dependent
│   ├── Doctrine/Entity/ #   Doctrine ORM entities (separate from domain models)
│   ├── Doctrine/Repository/ # Doctrine repository implementations
│   └── ...              #   External adapters, Swoole workers, etc.
└── Interface/           # API layer — controllers, request/response DTOs
    ├── Controller/      #   Symfony controllers with #[Route] attributes
    ├── Request/         #   Request validation DTOs
    ├── Resource/        #   API response resources (extend AbstractResource)
    └── Console/         #   Symfony console commands
```

### Dependency Rule

Dependencies point inward only:

```
Interface → Application → Domain
Infrastructure → Application → Domain
```

- **Domain** never imports from Application, Infrastructure, or Interface
- **Application** never imports from Infrastructure or Interface
- **Infrastructure** implements interfaces defined in Application or Domain
- **Interface** calls Application ports; never directly accesses Infrastructure

## Key Design Patterns

### Aggregate Root with State Object

Aggregate roots use a shared `{Entity}State` value object for constructor/reconstitute sync:

```php
final class Album
{
    private function __construct(
        private AlbumState $state,
    ) {}

    public static function create(string $title, ...): self
    {
        return new self(new AlbumState(
            id: new Uuid(),
            publicId: new PublicId(),
            title: $title,
            ...
        ));
    }

    public static function reconstitute(AlbumState $state): self
    {
        return new self($state);
    }
}
```

### Port Pattern (Canonical)

Controllers inject port interfaces from the Application layer. Infrastructure provides implementations:

```php
// Application/Port/SongPortInterface.php
interface SongPortInterface
{
    public function findByUuid(Uuid $uuid): ?Song;
    public function save(Song $song): void;
}

// Infrastructure/Service/SongService.php
class SongService implements SongPortInterface { ... }

// config/services.yaml
App\Catalog\Application\Port\SongPortInterface:
    alias: App\Catalog\Infrastructure\Service\SongService
```

### CQRS with Symfony Messenger

Commands are `final readonly` DTOs dispatched via `MessageBusInterface`. Handlers use `#[AsMessageHandler]`:

```php
final readonly class CreatePlaylistCommand { ... }

final class CreatePlaylistHandler
{
    #[AsMessageHandler]
    public function __invoke(CreatePlaylistCommand $command): Playlist { ... }
}
```

### Anti-Corruption Layers

External systems are isolated behind adapter patterns:

| External | Context | Isolation |
|----------|---------|-----------|
| League OAuth2 Server | Auth | Repository interfaces aliased in services.yaml |
| Discogs, Last.fm, MusicBrainz, Spotify, TasteDive, CoverArtArchive | Metadata | Per-API adapter classes in Infrastructure |
| FFmpeg | Transcode | `FFmpegPortInterface` + Swoole process pool isolation |

## Async Runtime

### Swoole Configuration

- **Mode:** Process mode with HMR (hot module replacement in dev)
- **Workers:** Multiple Swoole worker processes
- **Runtime hooks:** `Runtime::enableCoroutine()` hooks standard I/O (PDO, curl, file operations)
- **Blocking isolation:** `proc_open()` (FFmpeg) runs in separate process pool workers

### Async Primitives

- `Shared\Infrastructure\Swoole\Async::sleep()` — coroutine-aware sleep (auto-detects context)
- `Shared\Infrastructure\Swoole\ProcessPool\CpuProcessPool` — process pool for CPU-heavy work
- `Shared\Infrastructure\Swoole\WebSocketConnectionRegistry` — WebSocket connection management
- `Shared\Infrastructure\Swoole\WebSocketPusher` — WebSocket push via Redis Pub/Sub

### Real-Time Protocols

| Protocol | Purpose | Transport |
|----------|---------|-----------|
| WebSocket | Party playback sync | Swoole WS server → Redis Pub/Sub |
| SSE | Notification delivery | Redis Pub/Sub → SSE controller |
| HTTP/2 | API + streaming | Nginx → Swoole |

## Database Design

- **Primary keys:** UUID v7 (`Uuid` domain model, `UuidType` Doctrine type)
- **String columns:** Always `TEXT` (validation in application layer)
- **JSON columns:** Always `JSONB`
- **Full-text search:** PGroonga via `PgroongaSearchTrait` on repositories implementing `Searchable`

## Shared Kernel

The Shared context (`src/Shared/`) provides cross-cutting primitives:

- **Domain:** `Uuid`, `PublicId`, `Email`, `Cursor*`, `SearchOptions`, `SearchResult`, `JobStatus`, `AbstractDomainEvent`
- **Application:** `CancellableJobInterface`, `JobCancelledException`
- **Infrastructure:** Doctrine types, Messenger middleware, Swoole primitives, Redis, SSE, caching, health checks, logging
- **Interface:** Base controllers, DTOs, `AbstractResource`, console commands

See the [Context Map](context-map.md) for the full shared kernel catalog.
